title: Monitoring and Profiling Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on database monitoring and profiling.

questions.question: What is the primary role of database monitoring?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database server and queries

questions.question: Which of these is a key metric to monitor for database performance?
Regarding database profiling, what is the best tool to use to identify bottlenecks in a specific query?
A record of all queries that take more than a specific amount of time to execute is called a _______.
